messages.content:
Everyone will be able to chat over here in the main channel, which will serve as our audience. We encourage cheering and laughing and fun, but do try to keep things PG-13ish just like we do on the boards! eyes @Darth_Michael warily

If you have a question, don't be afraid to ask it here, even while the ceremony is going on! We want everyone to have fun and be included! The Stage (over yonder [⁠The Stage](https://discord.com/channels/908556304568684575/1497383322526158959)) will only allow for admins and Ceremony Speakers to chat/send messages. 

If you're on a computer (desktop/laptop) or on a web browser, you should be able to view both the main channel here and the "Thread" that serves as The Stage in a split-screen presentation. This will let you have the channel and The Stage side by side.
Guess not.  Let me try again.
Testing yet again.  Hi KSaraSara.  Maybe I have created a working login.  Whew!
TY.  Obviously, I am new to DIscord.
Gotta run for tonight.  Hopefully, I will return for the ceremony tomorrow.

> but do try to keep things PG-13ish just like we do on the boards! eyes @Darth_Michael warily

You bring one Cat to the ball and there goes the reputation 
...
thanks for all the guidance. It's super easy to come into this channel and then open the stage which appears on the right.
also helpfully, if I click away to another active channel then come back to the Kerth Ceremony, the split screen is still here
Now to just line up all the presenting texts in a Word doc ready to copy and paste.
Big shout out to @JadedEvie for her personalised BTS guidance!
Apologies now for when I trip over the mic, fall off the stage, have a wardrobe malfunction etc etc etc
Feeling all nervous now! 😅 I'm stuck doing things from my phone as dont have a computer here at mums, but I think I should be fine!

We are all friends here, even if it is the formal event of the year! 🥰. I'm doing some of the category introductions too, and it's the first time I've ever attended the Kerths! We will get it figured out!
The stage channel is read only currently, will that change when its time to present?
Yep! When it’s your time to present, you’ll be given the Ceremony Speaker role, which allows you to speak there 😊
I'm here.... stressed with a slight headache and tired, but I'm here.
I am here but will being doing housework so I'll pop in sporadically
I'm here. Sort of. I'm going to pop in and out
haii what's happening and.. where is it happening?
Don't worry, @KSaraSara will take good care of your awards if you're away. she might even send you a photo of them later
no it's not the AM anymore!
how do we do the split screen though??
Be on a desktop and click on the Thread at the top of this channel
It just did it automatically when i clicked the stage arrow at the top
It will automatically open it on the right side
nope, for me it transfers me to the window
It did that on my phone
There was the three dots, on top of the stage screen for me to click and it asked if I wanted split screen
We don't talk about age-math here. this is supposed to be a happy place!
@KSaraSara you just don't want to admit how old you are!
you're only as old as the last Kerth Award you took home.
I'm pretty sure I'm at the rewind maths stage
Come to think of it, that's probably why Sara takes care of the orphaned ones during the ceremony
Im at the 'literally can't remember how old I am' stage
I have to math everytime someone asks me, lol
yeah, easier to just tell the year of birth 😄

my sister is 19 years and 9 months younger than me. So I round it to 20 years. Except that we both ahve a habit of rounding up our age months before our birthday. if she does it too, I lose all sense of how old I am
It gets bad when you have to include the century with the year
All I know is I graduated high school 30 years ago this year, and I was in high school when Lois & Clark started.
I'm too busy keeping track of my kid's ages/birthdates to know how old I am
Is it? Uhhh, I've had to do that for the last 26 years. I guess I'm used to it, lol
you only have to do it if you've been born before 1926, I'd say
@KSaraSara don't worry, we're used to your Author Notes. only means we're going to get a nice new story soon.
Nope, it was a solid team effort!
I'm pretty sure life is a solid team effort
I certainly couldn't do without the people around me, and they rely on me too!
This is only my second Kerths. I'd just joined the fandom a month or so before last years. You'll have to keep going a few years more so I can attend 30!
Same! So cool to be attending my first and thinking about more to come!
I'm not so vain 😆 I just literally can't remember and have to use a calculator every time
ah, these were all great reads
do you have to worry when your (to come later) speech is longer than best micro?
yup, it was hard to choose!
I really stuggled to narrow down my nominations
Congrats! I just LOVED that sweet little story!
I think Bakasi will be able to be on in the second half of the ceremony!
Winner banners will arrive within a week or so.
Um, that looks like 3 nominees, rather than 5.  Should I be confused?
I only see 3 in the kerth listing
Some had less nominees this year
There are 3 in the short list.
I love all of these though, reveals are so yummy
How many Kerths now???? Lois would be seething with jealousy!
yep, one of the hardest categories to choose!

while @KSaraSara's typing...
this is why we let her win early, so we can adjust the timing of the rest of the ceremony
@KSaraSara I LOVED LOVED LOVED that Elvis story! Thank you for the research. 🥹
Best fic there could have been from those prompts!
*inserts gif of Stephanie Tanner from Full House... "how rude!"* 🤣
(pedantic jokes? since she said "in silence" don't mind me 🤣 )
We are happy to have you! (you can change your display name if you want, but we have gotten to know this one and it's great)
"Nope" is my favorite story of this year!
Did you do a Jimmy and rig the game?
I don't worry about the format since I will be adding Carrie's banners to the transcript
You need to take out the envelope!
ohhhh maybe we should post them as we go... (watch, that was supposed to be the plan and I forgot...)
it brings up a PM from the tech guy 😄
That sounds like an aspiration for next year!
oooh wow a 3 way tie! Y'all weren't kidding when you said you were having trouble deciding lol
No way. That is fun to put on a banner...
This was a hard decision so I love that it’s a tie!!
Ahhh crazy! Well done all of you!
Congrats to all three winners!!! Those were such great stories!!
congrats everyone!! I had so much fun with this category!!
I thought @Idon'tknowwhatthatmeans5678  was kidding! This is incredible!
@Idon'tknowwhatthatmeans5678 doesnt get to pocket all three?
I mean, I'm keeping them safe...
Well, in years past, we had babies popping up. now it's the dogs of said babies 😄
I wish it was grandbabies, but oh well. She's five hours away.
All my babies are with grandma today
My youngest is just waking up, but she's 11. I let her sleep in.
Oh, fun! I get to divvie up the speech between Cat and Blg in the transcript!
no can do. this is the only day I get to do housework uninterrupted
And @KSaraSara  told *me* to keep it PG13 🤷‍♂️
pffft kissing is totally within that rating... usually...
I'm worried there's going to be hair pulling soon
Lois was kissing Superman in a very...adult way
Why exactly was Cat invited up on stage?
It seems to be a tradition. I only brought a tabby two years ago...
The only think more powerful than lack of creativity is the need for ~~smut~~ romance.
I had a preview of this vid and it is SO CUTE.
I hope to get a youtube version later so I can include in the transcript
I thought it was the PG-13 version of the nfic category?
YES! And just reminder for everyone that speeches,  including videos, are eligible for the fanart category the following year!!!
Oh yeah, I had a preview also.  That's what this was for.... tells you how my brain works lately.
@blg1987 really leveled up the Kerth's this year!
/waits for envelope to get taken out/
Or we'll just have to put her into a story about who stole Lois's Kerth Awards
what? She's feeling unwell, I was just gonna help carry it for her...
Why do you think I like to write murders and mayhem in my stories? I can't do it in RL. And it gets out my aggresion.
ooh yes, also an excellent outlet for rage lol
*looks at own tendancy to physically beat up beat up characters*
By typing really hard on your keyboard?
Oops, I think that's my fault about shifting the Agenda last minute
OI I thought I was mispasting!
Googling 'what does electrocution actually feel like?'
I think this song doesn't go well to our outfit. Listening to Kasey Kasem's Top 100 of 1985 and we're on #57 We Don't Need Another Hero by Tina Turner
Depends on the circumstances. Sometimes, Lois felt it really empowering
omg my google searches are sociopathic. Bombs, gunshot wounds, poison, falling from a great height, lockpicking.
We need a whump category next year
Yaaas.  Whump and Villain and Location!
... who's gonna tell her we can't actually see her...?
Did you leave a naked Cat in the foyer?
Maybe Cats just upset to be wearing @Idon'tknowwhatthatmeans5678 clothes
Sort of like the Emperor's new clothes, huh?
And if she got *Cat's* dress, does that mean we're going to be seeing @Idon'tknowwhatthatmeans5678 *a lot*?
no but the notifs popping up really do mess with you
ohhhhh that typo is very hilariously apt...
Congrats @lovetvfan on that smoking hot adaptation!!
Can we drag her in here?
It's bad when I start laughing and the fam starts asking 'Why"
She was talking a bit earlier
I'm sure @KSaraSara would never pilfer from *her*...
I mean, I'm upset to be wearing my clothes
I'm just sitting here IN AWE of everyone here keeping the fandom alive and genuinely so excited to read all these stories. :amazed:
@Darth_Michael told me that the 18 participants last year was the most to be in a ficathon!
Gosh, this presenting malarky is knackering
Ack sorry! I am at an ice cream museum and it's out in the middle of nowhere and the internet keeps cutting out! Thank you!!
Thank you for doing it! It makes a lot of fun for the rest of us!
There's a museum devoted to ice cream!?😮
Happy to. Just didn't know I could get lost on my own laptop 🤣
Yeah it's a Canadian dairy company - Gay Lea dairy . We're making butter atm lol
If I disappear it's because I have no internet lol but I'm trying to keep an eye
Agh congrats @JadedEvie I loved that fic!
Congratulations @JadedEvie It was a wonderful story!
(well I loved all the stories, but you know)
it was so much fun! I loved how you played with the prompt!
Sequel? we probably gonna start calling her Nan2...
I already started. They’re off to Kansas.
As I always say: more fic is more fic. And more @JadedEvie fic is always a scrumptious treat!
No spoilers! I'm still on my backlog 😭
Uh, I just teared up for that win. I really loved that story. Thank you, all. Really.
/remarks that there's a very simple way to @KSaraSara  to get more Awards/
hey now! Maybe I have lots of stories done already and just need to finish up the authors notes...
... which I guess still doesn't save me from the :nag: ... d'oh
Oh, @KSaraSara, all of us have those Clark excuses ready.
I left them in my other pants. These are my special Kerth ~~Pilfering~~ Pants
Noted for next years dress code
Seriously, I was sending my friend snippets as I read that one saying 'this is how I want to write'
Congrats @lovetvfan I just adored this story! I can’t tell you how fast I read it - in one shot, at like 2 in the morning! 💘
So I could as long as it doesn't cut me off mid speech 😂
I'll just round robin and finish the speech for you lol
you mean the part where you accept the Kerth?
I feel like @lovetvfan can write alt-Clark as often as she likes! 😉😂:nag:
/realizes that we might now have to say good bye to our planned end time 😄

Yay @KSaraSara - you know how much I loved that one! And yay @blg1987 - that was such an incredible walk through alt-Clark's rescue! Lois seeing the little bird and trusting it and him was so magical!
YES I loved the story so much and not just cuz it was written FOR me lol
I laugh. @blg1987 thought it was too long and then I got @JadedEvie and @lovetvfan stories, haha. I assured her she was fine!
You're a hero for organizing all of our crazy chaos!
Running off to grab some din dins

I'm just catching up on the chat. Congratulations to everyone so far!!! The kids are doing a craft and then we get to make ice cream but it has been lovely to see so many different amazing stores honoured
I thought yours was SO good as well! Just gorgeous writing
Back with food. No swooning on stage
yeah, you're tech graemlin in the other hand got both hands on the keyboard, managing...uuu...four? windows on two screens 😄
Grabbing Tylenol for this horrible headache. Challenges. Challenges.
*sneaks in back and looks around for empty seat...*
*hides the size of her left pants pocket...*
@QueenoftheCapes  You can ~~accost~~ discuss with @KSaraSara your missing Kerth awards
I feel like @Darth_Michael always has the most fun at these things. 😂
Congratulations, @Bek ! /watches as another award vanishes in the depth of @KSaraSara 's pants/
Yay @Bek! That story was so poignant!
Congrats @Bek !! Who doesn't love Martha and Jonathan!!
that pocket is getting pretty full @KSaraSara . Are you storing those trophies in the same place Clark stores his cape and boots?
YEP! In hyperspace (tm Debby Stark who probably nabbed it from comics or something lol)
it's explained in the scroll. Sara2 is at an ice cream museum
...and the story sort of unraveled from there, lol
Must've missed it while skimming to catch up.  Sounds cool!
oh, wasn't skim, pretty sure they're using whole milk
It's best to write stories located in the Goldilocks zone. Otherwise, you got barren rocks or hot gasseous balls no one can live on

> Lois: (suspiciously)  “What do you know about my novel?”
🤣🤣🤣🤣
Woooo! Congrats, @Socomama!! Are you here to give a speech?? 👀
Congratulations, @blg1987 ! You're the first repeat offender of the evening I believe?
It was such a good story
sequel title: Worth Two in the Bush
I'd love to see that trust continue to grow
You have to tie him to a bed and have your wicked way with him. There's all sorts of implements for this.
yeah, we best not let @90stvfangirl see this, else she'll run off and write a cracky fic so cracky that it's eeriely real...
I know waffy stands for Warm and Fuzzy Feelings, but no idea who came up with it
Still can't believe that short story won a Kerth and got another nomination

Congrats @Socomama.
Now I'm going to lie down and try to get rid of this headache that has now turned into a nech ache also.
I hope it helps and you feel better
Maybe @KSaraSara should bring a handcart next time
Being called away too.  Congratulations to all the winners! 🫶
Congratulations @lovetvfan ! Are you done making butter?
Yay @lovetvfan I absolutely DEVOURED that story! I love the time period SO much and the world building was so incredible!
yay!!! @lovetvfan  I absolutely love that story!
Seriously, it was such immersive world building
I was so there with Clark
What everyone said! And it was also such an easy and flowing read - given its length, it went by so fast!
P.s. I think it says best dramatic story there not long story
she doesn't know the difference lol
It was amazing! I actually regretted needing to read it through so fast, but she turned it in the day before the final day of posting, haha
That was my bad! Sorry for the icky copy/paste!
I obviously missed my organizing. Of course it's for best long
I didn't even notice who did the typo, I'm just here to throw my twin under the bus for long stuff (that we love)
Not your error, I made it when I was building my presentation lineup
oh my, Herb likes to interrupt the nfic!!
What's *he* got to do with getting them nekid?
Also, so many of the Kerth presentations are so funny and fun and witty this year, like.. so glad these are Kerth eligible.
Hope Cat peeking round the curtain isn't distracting him
I have to cut out for a bit
Oh never mind Scott is driving lol
just when one of your household name cats is up!
Can't keep Cat off that stage!
maybe I'll just let her MC next year....
Looks like she finally found a new dress, or else did some fast sewing with that curtain!
You have to *wear* clothing to get an award for it!
We're driving home & Scott offered to drive lol
oh wow, he hates driving, doesn't he?
give Scott a Good Hubby Award 🏆
Congratulations, @lovetvfan ! And tell Scott it was wise he's driving!
Yay @lovetvfan ! I loved this story - heartaching and smoking!
be sure to tell him we gave him an award too!
At least she can just put the award in the back of the car she's in!
No trouble with carrying them all
I did see her typing earlier, so we'll wait a min...
Stupid ice cream museum out in the middle of nowhere *grumbles* 😆
The 'encouragement' is really just a lure for more fic, lol
Yay @blg1987 ! Huge congrats! Can't wait to see more of your writing!
Congratulations @blg1987 ! A well deserved honor! And it was a another very stiff competition this year!
congrats!!! And yes, we had so much great competition this year!!
Congratulations @blg1987 ! 👏💐 I loved reading your stuff!
Are you sure that wasn't the Nfic category? 😆
@KSaraSara See? *I* am not the naughty one!
Omg @blg1987 you are totally a "real writer"!
So glad to decided to open up with stories, @blg1987 ! And reserve next year around this time to present the next Best New Author award! /eyes FoLCdom/
Love to all my fellow new authors. We are a great 'cohort' 😅
Are we the year of 2025 or 2026?
Good cos I much prefer that as a year. An odd number. but not an odd number cos it's a quarter of a century
the award year/submitted year is always making my brain itch (but that's maybe because of my lack of ability to deal with time and math anymore 😆 )
just deal with words and remember that 1+1+1=2
So fun! Congrats to the podcasters!
Oh wow, we are shocked and so honored!!!
Wow!! Thanks to everyone who voted for us!!
Congratulations, @Jenn & @Julie ! So glad you could make it!
so we're totally going to wrangle you into writing and other art forms, right?? 😉
You should check out or episode rewatch threads on the message boards!
oh, is there another for a speech?
my bad! I'm so behind on all the things, I didn't know 😅
Same as with the others, I do *not* know who won that one until the envelope gets opened!
It's why I try to fdk as I read. a blessing and a curse...
I do that until we hit Quiz Season. Then I read every single thing in a week.
Also, typing on a mobile phone is *tedious*!
you should make an app for the boards like they have for AO3
I use the phone split screen and copying. the typing is the hard part
I can't even do FDK on my phone, like at all. That's quite an accomplishment.
please let it not be me. please let it not be me.
@Socomama  is here! You can get your Kerths from @KSaraSara !

Oh my gosh you guys! I didn’t know this was today 😆😆 I thought it was on Sunday. I have a huge event I am setting up for today (I am in charge of) so was popping in on a quick dissociation break, ha. What did I win? Wow! I am well, *super* honored - especially given the serious talent in my categories. I would like to thank @KSaraSara for all her guidance with our first fic, without which the Ruse surely would not have happened. Blushing ☺️ love this fandom! Thank you all so much.
The suspense is killing me lol
/hunts down Tempus and puts him in same cell as Kyle Griffin/
Oh, or if she was returning a VHS 📼 it *would* be a very long trek to get it to the last remaining Blockbuster
Now THAT would be a team-up....
(I can't believe they have a 📼 emoji LOL)
Easy, just take a bit of gold and pop it into the gas tank of your time sled..
Ack Scott wants to switch back 😂 He just went into a store but I might miss the end
Nope, stays a hit and miss afair
I'm on my phone now and it would be too difficult to post
Looking at the nominee list, I feel like there are a couple of good reasons to stick around?
not true about the time tracveling!
I love how many great stories were in this category!
Yay for a big set of stories for a big category!
Yay @lovetvfan ! Amazing work on this story!!!
Some things are more important than getting home!
Congratulations @lovetvfan ! It really was an amazing story and even more incredible that you pulled it off in a time crunch.
I have to run. They just got back but thank you! ❤️
Thanks for all your planning and work, Kerths team!
I think we ended on a high note! It was amazing to be part of that moment 🥰

Congratulations to winners, and nominees, and to everyone out there writing and posting and feedbacking and creating and organising
 and just well doing all the things!

Thanks to all authors and creators for your amazing works. Thanks to all organizators. Congratulations to all winners 🎉 
It was lovely event ❤️
I had fun. Thank you everyone who worked so hard to organize it!
Another really great awards ceremony. Thank you to everyone who worked hard to make this Kerth season fun!
I was here a year ago and didn't know anyone. Now I feel I've made some buddies, I've read a lot of stories and feel pride and joy hearing what your wins and writing and this fandom means to you

Thank you all for joining us this morning-evening! You've been an awesome crowd! the transcript will be available in a couple of days on the Kerth Site and @KSaraSara will post the winners on the boards.
Thanks to everyone making this happen, organising voting, cheering! Its been such a blast!
Extra thanks to everyone who joined us for the event, and who NOMINATED and VOTED, so that we could all get here!
YES the nominations and the votes are so crucial!
And big props for @KSaraSara for emceeing the ENTIRE EVENT! 👏
AND I think I managed to hide the stain on Cat's dress by folding it carefully when handing it back
Cat tells me she had a lot of fun too (while ducking into a Taxi with some fittie)
I'm not allowed to comment on stains in combination with dresses worn by Cat even though it's already past kiddy bedtime over here.
Night everyone, that was a blast!
Have a great Saturday-day or a good night! 👋 It's time now for the ~~Jedi~~ Darth to eat.
